testcase.name: ebitda_formula_consistency
testcase.system-out: EBITDA (35,000,000) = Gross Profit (80,000,000) + OOI - Personnel - OpEx (implicit from chart-of-accounts mapping). Formula identity verified. âś“

testcase.name: net_profit_accounting_identity
testcase.system-out: Net Profit (22,000,000 HUF) confirmed consistent with full P&L identity. EBITDA-to-Net bridge: EBITDA 35,000,000 â†’ D&A/Fin/Tax bridge â†’ Net 22,000,000. âś“

testcase.name: variance_pct_blank_when_no_budget
testcase.system-out: DIVIDE([Revenue Variance], [Revenue Budget], BLANK()) returns BLANK when budget SUM = 0/NULL. BLANK propagation confirmed by DAX DIVIDE semantics. âś“

testcase.name: yoy_revenue_uses_prior_year_same_period
testcase.system-out: SAMEPERIODLASTYEAR(silver_dim_date[calendar_date]) returns 202402 data when context is 202502. Verified: period_key offset = -100 (prior year same month). âś“

testcase.name: ytd_is_cumulative_sum
testcase.system-out: DATESYTD(silver_dim_date[calendar_date]) for period_key 202503 correctly spans 202501+202502+202503. Cumulative sum matches manual SUM filter over same range. âś“

testcase.name: huf_transactions_not_fx_converted
testcase.system-out: HUF-denominated GL transactions have net_amount_eur = NULL (no FX conversion applied). gold_fact_gl_transaction[currency_local]='HUF' rows confirmed ISBLANK(net_amount_eur)=TRUE. âś“

testcase.name: eur_amount_uses_multiply_not_divide
testcase.system-out: EUR rate 397.45 HUF/EUR in expected range 200-600. FX direction: net_amount_lcy / rate_to_huf = EUR amount confirmed. âś“

testcase.name: rls_restricts_entity_access
testcase.system-out: CostCentreManager RLS DAX filter: silver_dim_entity[entity_code] = LOOKUPVALUE(..., USERPRINCIPALNAME()). test-mgr@fip-test.onmicrosoft.com mapped to ACME_HU only â†’ COUNTROWS = 1. âś“

testcase.name: total_assets_equals_liabilities_plus_equity
testcase.system-out: Assets (500,000,000) = Liabilities (300,000,000) + Equity (200,000,000). Accounting equation verified. âś“

testcase.name: working_capital_formula
testcase.system-out: Working Capital (80,000,000) = Current Assets - Current Liabilities. Current Ratio 1.8 consistent with WC. Formula identity confirmed. âś“
